📐 RS FORMULA USED IN THIS SCAN

    

      

        
RS (1 Month)

        
Fund_1M% − Benchmark_1M%

        
= — 1M return used as base

      

      

        
RS (2 Month)

        
Fund_2M% − Benchmark_2M%

        
Real return, ~42 trading days back (historical closes)

      

      

        
RS (3 Month)

        
Fund_3M% − Benchmark_3M%

        
Real return, ~63 trading days back (historical closes)

      

      

        
RS Score

        
(RS1M×3 + RS2M×2 + RS3M×1) ÷ 6

        
Weighted → recent carries more

      

    

    

      
LEADERRS_1M > 0 & RS_3M > 0

      
IMPROVINGRS_1M > 0 (any 3M)

      
WATCHRS_1M near 0 (±0.5%)

      
LAGGARDRS_1M < 0 & RS_3M < 0

    

  


  
  

    

      
—

Hilega Milega — Weekly RSI Switch

          
Weekly RSI crosses above 50 → Equity  |  crosses below 50 → Corporate Bond

        

        

          
          
          
        

        

          
—

          
Run NPS Scanner, then choose an AMC above.

        

      


      
      

        

          
4-Year Historical Validation

          
Every past Hilega/Milega crossing for this AMC + Tier, and what it would have returned

        

        
Run NPS Scanner, then choose an AMC above.

        

          

            

              
Switches

              
—

            

            

              
Strategy Return

              
—

            

            

              
Buy & Hold E

              
—

            

          

          
Switch log (oldest → newest)

          

            

              
                

                  Date
                  Switch
                  W-RSI
                  Held for
                  Leg Return
                

              
              
            

          

          

            Simulated: starts fully in whichever fund the rule implies at the first available week, switches 100% E⇄C on every weekly-RSI cross of 50 using that week's close. Ignores CRA switch processing time, exit load, and any switch-frequency limits — treat as directional validation, not an exact backtest.
          

        

      


      

        Advisory only — based on this fund's Weekly RSI Regime (A/B/C) and Daily RSI zone, same logic as NPS Scanner. Enter the switch manually on the CRA / PFRDA app.
      


      
      

        

          
Best Combination — Across All AMCs

          
PFRDA allows mixing fund managers per asset class — this ranks every AMC's Scheme E and Scheme C independently and pairs the strongest of each.

        

        

          
          
        

        
Run NPS Scanner first.

        

          

            

              
Strongest Scheme E

              
—

—

              

            

          

          
⚠️ Best E and best C both come from the same AMC this time — no cross-AMC mixing needed right now.


          

            
Suggested Allocation — This Combination

            

            

              
E —%

              
C —%

            

            

          


          
Full ranking — all AMCs, this Tier

          

            

              
                

                  AMC
                  Scheme
                  Regime
                  D-RSI
                  >20WMA
                

              
              
            

          

          

            Ranked by Regime (A best, then B, then C), then Daily RSI closest to the 40–50 optimal-entry zone without being overheated, then price-vs-20WMA. This ranks fund strength, not fund size/AUM/expense ratio — cross-check those separately before switching. Also confirm CRA / PFRDA doesn't cap how many fund managers you can hold per Tier.
